title: MGU – Veterinarian – 1 Posts

basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) has released recruitment notification for 1 Veterinarian Post. Candidates with Degree in Veterinary Science and Kerala Veterinary Council registration can apply through email mode. The application process closes on 30-05-2026. Candidates should apply as per instructions available on the MGU website, mgu.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Veterinary Science and registered with Kerala Veterinary Council, or retired Veterinary Doctors.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MGU Veterinarian Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
